text: The company is Northstar, an AI infrastructure startup based in Palo Alto.
Northstar is closing a Series A led by Sequoia (example); target close is July 18, 2026.
The flagship product is the Northstar API; v2 launches July 25, 2026.
Key enterprise customer: MegaCorp (Dana Fox is their VP of Engineering).
Leadership team: Nadia Cohen (CFO), Victor Ruiz (Head of Engineering), Mia Anders (Recruiter).
The Head of Sales search is in final stages; Tom Reyes is the lead candidate.
Acme Partners is negotiating a co-marketing partnership; LOI target July 15, 2026.
The office lease renewal (3-year, same terms) needs sign-off by July 4, 2026.
